title: Extract shared TopicList component from VectorTopicMemory

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: Extract shared TopicList component from VectorTopicMemory

  Scenario: VectorTopicMemory renders identically after extraction
    Given a VectorTopicMemory report block with 5 topics
    And the topics have memory tiers, lifecycle tiers, keywords, and exemplars
    When the block is rendered using the shared TopicList component
    Then the rendered output is visually identical to the previous inline rendering
    And memory tier badges appear for each topic
    And lifecycle tier badges appear for each topic
    And keywords and exemplars are shown in expandable sections

  Scenario: TopicList accepts topics with string exemplars
    Given a topic with exemplars as plain strings (legacy format)
    When TopicList renders the topic
    Then each exemplar is displayed as quoted italic text
    And no Item link is shown

  Scenario: TopicList accepts topics with object exemplars
    Given a topic with exemplars as objects containing text and item_id
    When TopicList renders the topic
    Then each exemplar shows the quoted text
    And an Item identifier link is shown alongside (handled by Story 5)

  Scenario: TopicList supports collapsible mode
    Given a TopicList with collapsible = true and defaultExpanded = false
    When initially rendered
    Then the topic list is collapsed
    When the user clicks the expand toggle
    Then the topic list expands to show all topics
